market_context: Market showing resilience amid geopolitical tensions with oil retreating from recent highs as diplomatic hopes emerge. Strong earnings season continues with major banks and tech companies reporting today.

predictions.reasoning: S&P 500 is within 1% of all-time high of 7,002.28 with strong momentum from recent rally. Oil price retreat from diplomatic progress and positive earnings sentiment should drive continued gains today.
Bank of America reports Q1 earnings pre-market today with consensus EPS of $1.00-$1.01. Strong capital position with 11.4% CET1 ratio and potential for dividend hike announcement should drive upside.

ASML's strong Q1 results and raised guidance driven by AI chip demand validates semiconductor strength. Tech stocks outperforming with AI infrastructure spending continuing to accelerate capacity expansion plans.
Oil prices retreating as diplomatic hopes emerge from Iran ceasefire talks. WTI down to $91 from triple-digit peaks as geopolitical risk premium erodes, pressuring energy stocks.
Strong Q1 beat with €8.8B sales vs €8.5B expected and raised 2026 guidance to €36-40B. Memory customers sold out through 2026 with supply constraints driving accelerated capacity expansion plans.
